label: Transfer, multitask & domain adaptation

node.label: Transfer, multitask & domain adaptation
node.definition: Knowledge learned in one task, domain, or modality is reused across others.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Transfer, multitask & domain adaptation is modeled as depending on Supervised learning, Embeddings & distributed representations and feeding downstream nodes such as Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer.
examples: atlas downstream link to Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Embeddings & distributed representations.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Transfer, multitask & domain adaptation has a `trained_under` dependency on Supervised learning with `common` strength.

In this atlas graph, Transfer, multitask & domain adaptation has a `uses` dependency on Embeddings & distributed representations because Embeddings & distributed representations is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Transfer, multitask & domain adaptation has a `uses` dependency on Datasets, sampling & splits because Datasets, sampling & splits is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
